methods.description: Process for collecting structural measurements along extension fractures and normal faults in the KFS rift area.

steps.description: Survey three areas of the rift in the field to collect structural measurements along both the extension fractures and normal faults.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct field survey to collect structural measurements

steps.description: Classify structures as normal faults when they show a continuous vertical offset >0.50 m, and as extension fractures when characterized by a vertical component <0.50 m.
steps.searchable_summary: classify structures based on vertical offset

steps.description: Collect local azimuth, amount of opening, and opening direction at extension fractures where piercing points are detectable.
steps.searchable_summary: measure azimuth, opening amount, and direction at extension fractures

steps.description: Measure dilation amount orthogonally to the extension fracture walls using a tape or laser rangefinder.
steps.searchable_summary: measure dilation amount using tape or laser rangefinder

steps.description: Collect vertical offset values along normal faults at intervals of 50 m using a tape, laser rangefinder, or GPS.
steps.searchable_summary: collect vertical offset values using tape, laser rangefinder, or GPS

methods.description: Analysis of structural data to calculate azimuth, length, and density variations, and to assess correlations and spatial variations.

steps.description: Calculate the azimuth and length of each mapped structure in a GIS environment (ArcMap v.10.6).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate azimuth and length in GIS

steps.description: Count the number of structures along 97 transects to quantify structure density variation along the rift.
steps.searchable_summary: count structures along transects for density variation

steps.description: Measure the rift width and average spacing along each transect.
steps.searchable_summary: measure rift width and average spacing

steps.description: Analyze collected data to check for correlations or spatial variations in the field surveyed areas.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze data for correlations and spatial variations

steps.description: Calculate the lateral component of motion from local azimuth and opening direction values.
Cumulate dilation values along three transects to calculate and compare stretch values in different sectors of the rift.
steps.searchable_summary: cumulate dilation values for stretch comparison
